literature-report-plan.name: R2-medical-mlops

metadata.title: Medical MLOps: From Preclinical Research to Clinical Regulated Deployment

literature-report-plan.invocation-prompt:
create literature report on "Medical MLOps: From Preclinical Research to Clinical Regulated Deployment"
Focus: The full spectrum from preclinical biomedical research MLOps to clinical regulated SaMD. MLOps maturity models for medical AI. Continuous documentation and auditing for FDA regulation. QMSR, PCCP, SaMD guidelines. How CI/CD pipelines become "production controls" under QMSR. IEC 62304 traceability via OpenLineage. SBOM via CycloneDX. Post-market surveillance via drift detection. The locked→adaptive model lifecycle. MedMLOps four pillars (availability, monitoring, privacy, ease of use).
Context: This repo has OpenLineage wired into 5 flows, CycloneDX SBOM, Evidently drift detection, TRIPOD compliance matrix, and a factorial experiment design that IS a PCCP template. The report should map the literature to our ACTUAL codebase capabilities.
Key existing refs to read first: - docs/planning/regops-fda-regulation-reporting-qms-samd-iec62304-mlops-report.md - docs/planning/fda-insights-second-pass.md - docs/planning/openlineage-marquez-iec62304-report.md - docs/planning/tripod-compliance-matrix.md
EXCLUDED topics: - Agentic AI (report 5) - Computational reproducibility fundamentals (report R1) - Specific segmentation models/methods (report R3) - Microscopy hardware (report R4)
Repo context: /home/petteri/Dropbox/github-personal/minivess-mlops KG domains to update: operations, infrastructure, testing Manuscript section: Methods (MLOps Architecture), Discussion (Regulatory-Native MLOps)

seed-papers.paper: Kreuzberger et al. (2023). "Machine Learning Operations (MLOps): Overview, Definition, and Architecture." IEEE Access. https://doi.org/10.1109/ACCESS.2023.3262138
de Almeida et al. (2025). "Medical machine learning operations." European Radiology. https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00330-025-11654-6
Pianykh et al. (2020). "Continuous Learning AI in Radiology." Radiology 297(1). https://doi.org/10.1148/radiol.2020200038
Vokinger et al. (2021). "Mitigating bias in machine learning for medicine." Communications Medicine 1, 25. https://doi.org/10.1038/s43856-021-00028-w
Feng et al. (2022). "Clinical AI Quality Improvement." Nature Medicine 28. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41591-022-01895-z
Collins et al. (2024). "TRIPOD+AI Statement." BMJ 385. https://doi.org/10.1136/bmj-2023-078378
Muehlematter et al. (2021). "Approval of AI-based medical devices." Lancet Digital Health 3(3). https://doi.org/10.1016/S2589-7500(20)30292-2

search-domains.domain: medical MLOps maturity model clinical AI deployment 2024 2025
QMSR 2026 quality management system regulation medical device software
PCCP predetermined change control plan FDA AI ML 2025 2026
post-market surveillance AI drift detection clinical 2024 2025
SBOM CycloneDX medical device software bill of materials 2025
